title: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation Statistics for 2024 Released

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Department for Transport has released its final report on the Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) statistics for 2024. This report details the supply of renewable fuels from January to December 2024, highlighting trends and progress in the UK's shift towards sustainable transportation options.

The RTFO plays a significant role in promoting the use of renewable fuels, which are essential in reducing carbon emissions in the transport sector. As Scotland continues to embrace sustainable aviation practices, the transition to renewable fuels is a crucial part of the nation’s broader commitment to environmental stewardship.
